title: Secure Password Manager
description: Built a secure, offline desktop password manager as part of a collaborative group project. The application encrypts all stored credentials using AES-256, secures access with a master password and multi-factor authentication (TOTP), and includes features such as password generation, strength analysis, reuse detection, and age-based security alerts.

title: Keylogger
description: A tool for educational purposes that logs keystrokes and takes screenshots. This tool demonstrates both software-based and hardware-based keylogging techniques.

title: Network Scanner
description: A command-line tool designed for network administrators and security professionals to scan and analyze network hosts using techniques like ICMP echo requests, TCP port scanning, and ARP scanning.

title: Vulnerability Scanner
description: A lightweight Python vulnerability scanner that scans target IPs/URLs for open ports, HTTP security headers, SSL/TLS certificate info, and known CVEs through banner-based lookup.

title: SecurePass - Password Health & Breach Monitoring App
description: A full-stack app that checks password strength and known data breaches using HaveIBeenPwned API and zxcvbn.

title: FoodHub Data Analysis
description: Performed exploratory data analysis for a food delivery company to understand customer demand across restaurants and cuisines. Generated actionable insights to improve customer experience and support business decisions.

title: Personal Loan Purchase Prediction
description: Built a machine learning classification model to predict whether liability customers are likely to purchase personal loans. Performed exploratory data analysis, feature correlation analysis, and customer segmentation to identify key attributes influencing loan adoption and support targeted marketing strategies.

title: Visa Approval Prediction
description: Developed a machine learning classification model to predict visa application outcomes based on applicant and employer attributes. Performed extensive exploratory data analysis, data preprocessing, and model evaluation to identify key factors influencing visa certification decisions and support data-driven screening recommendations.

title: Predictive Maintenance for Wind Turbine Failures
description: Built and evaluated multiple classification models to predict wind turbine generator failures using sensor data. Focused on cost-sensitive decision making by minimizing false negatives to reduce expensive equipment replacements while balancing inspection and repair costs through model tuning and performance comparison.

title: Medical Question Answering System using RAG
description: Developed a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) system to support medical question answering using the Merck Manuals as a trusted knowledge source. Built a pipeline to load and chunk large medical documents, generate embeddings, store them in a vector database, and retrieve relevant context to ground LLM responses for diagnostic, treatment, and clinical protocol queries.

title: Safety Helmet Detection using Computer Vision
description: Developed an image classification system to automatically detect whether workers are wearing safety helmets in hazardous environments. Built and evaluated multiple convolutional neural network (CNN) models, including transfer learning with VGG16 and data augmentation, to improve classification accuracy and support automated workplace safety monitoring.

title: File I/O Utility Library (Custom Insert, Delete, Extract)
description: Developed a low-level file manipulation library in C using system calls to insert, delete, and extract bytes from files at arbitrary positions without relying on stdio. Designed for systems programming coursework.
